tEn: On the Variance of the Adaptive Learning Rate and Beyond
tZh: 自适应学习率的方差及其改进
sEn: Warmup reduces early-stage variance of adaptive learning rates; RAdam rectifies this variance for better performance.
sZh: 预热机制通过降低自适应学习率早期阶段的方差来稳定训练，而RAdam通过修正方差进一步提升了性能。
absEn: The learning rate warmup heuristic achieves remarkable success in stabilizing training, accelerating convergence and improving generalization for adaptive stochastic optimization algorithms like RMSprop and Adam. Here, we study its mechanism in details. Pursuing the theory behind warmup, we identify a problem of the adaptive learning rate (i.e., it has problematically large variance in the early stage), suggest warmup works as a variance reduction technique, and provide both empirical and theoretical evidence to verify our hypothesis. We further propose RAdam, a new variant of Adam, by introducing a term to rectify the variance of the adaptive learning rate. Extensive experimental results on image classification, language modeling, and neural machine translation verify our intuition and demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our proposed method. All implementations are available at: https://github.com/LiyuanLucasLiu/RAdam.
absZh: 学习率预热启发式方法在稳定训练、加速收敛以及提升RMSprop和Adam等自适应随机优化算法的泛化能力方面取得了显著成功。本文详细研究了其机制。在探索预热背后的理论时，我们发现了自适应学习率的一个问题（即在早期阶段其方差过大），提出预热作为一种方差缩减技术，并通过实验和理论证据验证了我们的假设。我们进一步提出了RAdam，这是Adam的一个新变体，通过引入一项来修正自适应学习率的方差。在图像分类、语言建模和神经机器翻译上的大量实验结果验证了我们的直觉，并展示了所提方法的有效性和鲁棒性。所有实现均可从https://github.com/LiyuanLucasLiu/RAdam获取。

contrib.en: Identifies large variance of adaptive learning rate in early training as root cause of convergence issues.
contrib.zh: 发现自适应学习率在训练早期方差过大是收敛问题的根本原因。

contrib.en: Provides theoretical justification for warmup heuristic as variance reduction technique.
contrib.zh: 为预热启发式方法作为方差缩减技术提供了理论依据。

contrib.en: Proposes RAdam, a new Adam variant that rectifies adaptive learning rate variance.
contrib.zh: 提出RAdam，一种通过修正自适应学习率方差的新Adam变体。

contrib.en: Demonstrates RAdam's effectiveness and robustness across image classification, language modeling, and NMT.
contrib.zh: 在图像分类、语言建模和神经机器翻译上验证了RAdam的有效性和鲁棒性。

contrib.en: Shows RAdam reduces sensitivity to learning rate and warmup length hyperparameters.
contrib.zh: 表明RAdam降低了对学习率和预热步长超参数的敏感性。

limits.en: Analysis assumes gradients are i.i.d. Gaussian with zero mean, which may not hold in practice.
limits.zh: 分析假设梯度为独立同分布零均值高斯，实际中可能不成立。

limits.en: Approximation of exponential moving average by simple moving average may introduce error.
limits.zh: 用简单移动平均近似指数移动平均可能引入误差。

limits.en: First-order approximation of variance may be inaccurate for very small sample sizes.
limits.zh: 方差的一阶近似在样本量极小时可能不准确。

limits.en: RAdam's rectification term relies on hyperparameter β2, requiring tuning for optimal performance.
limits.zh: RAdam的修正项依赖超参数β2，需调参以获得最佳性能。

items.en: The learning rate warmup heuristic achieves remarkable success in stabilizing training, accelerating convergence and improving generalization for adaptive stochastic optimization algorithms like RMSprop and Adam. Pursuing the theory behind warmup, we identify a problem of the adaptive learning rate – its variance is problematically large in the early stage, and presume warmup works as a variance reduction technique. We provide both empirical and theoretical evidence to verify our hypothesis. We further propose Rectified Adam (RAdam), a novel variant of Adam, by introducing a term to rectify the variance of the adaptive learning rate. Experimental results on image classification, language modeling, and neural machine translation verify our intuition and demonstrate the efficacy and robustness of RAdam.111All implementations are available at: https://github.com/LiyuanLucasLiu/RAdam.
items.zh: 学习率预热启发式方法在稳定训练、加速收敛和提升自适应随机优化算法（如RMSprop和Adam）的泛化能力方面取得了显著成功。为了探究预热背后的理论，我们发现了自适应学习率的一个问题——其方差在早期阶段过大，并推测预热作为一种方差缩减技术起作用。我们提供了经验和理论证据来验证我们的假设。我们进一步提出了修正Adam（RAdam），这是Adam的一种新变体，通过引入一项来修正自适应学习率的方差。在图像分类、语言建模和神经机器翻译上的实验结果验证了我们的直觉，并展示了RAdam的有效性和鲁棒性。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Training loss v.s. # of iterations of Transformers on the De-En IWSLT’14 dataset.
items.capZh: 图1：在De-En IWSLT'14数据集上，Transformer的训练损失与迭代次数的关系。

items.en: Fast and stable optimization algorithms are what generations of researchers have been pursuing (Gauss, 1823; Cauchy, 1847). Remarkably, stochastic gradient-based optimization, such as stochastic gradient descent (SGD), has witnessed tremendous success in many fields of science and engineering despite its simplicity. Recently, many efforts have been made to accelerate optimization by applying adaptive learning rate. In particular, Adagrad (Duchi et al., 2010) and its variants, e.g., RMSprop (Hinton et al., 2012), Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2014), Adadelta (Zeiler, 2012) and Nadam (Dozat, 2016), stand out due to their fast convergence, and have been considered as the optimizer of choice in many applications.
items.zh: 快速且稳定的优化算法是几代研究者追求的目标（Gauss, 1823; Cauchy, 1847）。值得注意的是，基于随机梯度的优化，如随机梯度下降（SGD），尽管简单，但在科学和工程的许多领域取得了巨大成功。最近，许多工作致力于通过应用自适应学习率来加速优化。特别是，Adagrad（Duchi等人，2010）及其变体，如RMSprop（Hinton等人，2012）、Adam（Kingma & Ba, 2014）、Adadelta（Zeiler, 2012）和Nadam（Dozat, 2016），因其快速收敛而脱颖而出，并在许多应用中被视为首选优化器。

items.en: However, it has been observed that these optimization methods may converge to bad/suspicious local optima, and have to resort to a warmup heuristic – using a small learning rate in the first few epochs of training to mitigate such problem (Vaswani et al., 2017; Popel & Bojar, 2018). For example, when training typical Transformers based neural machine translation models on the De-En IWSLT’14 dataset, removing the warmup stage increases the training loss from 3 to around 10, as shown in Figure 1. Similar phenomena are observed in other scenarios like BERT (a bidirectional transformer language model) pre-training (Devlin et al., 2019).
items.zh: 然而，观察到这些优化方法可能收敛到不良/可疑的局部最优，并且不得不采用预热启发式方法——在训练的前几个epoch使用较小的学习率来缓解此问题（Vaswani等人，2017；Popel & Bojar, 2018）。例如，在De-En IWSLT'14数据集上训练典型的基于Transformer的神经机器翻译模型时，移除预热阶段会使训练损失从3增加到大约10，如图1所示。在其他场景如BERT（一种双向Transformer语言模型）预训练中也观察到类似现象（Devlin等人，2019）。

items.en: Due to the lack of the theoretical underpinnings, there is neither guarantee that warmup would bring consistent improvements for various machine learning settings nor guidance on how we should conduct warmup. Thus, researchers typically use different settings in different applications and have to take a trial-and-error approach, which can be tedious and time-consuming.
items.zh: 由于缺乏理论基础，既不能保证预热能为各种机器学习设置带来一致的改进，也没有关于如何进行预热的指导。因此，研究人员通常在不同应用中使用不同设置，并不得不采用试错法，这可能是繁琐且耗时的。

items.en: In this paper, we conduct both empirical and theoretical analysis of the convergence issue to identify its origin. We show that its root cause is: the adaptive learning rate has undesirably large variance in the early stage of model training, due to the limited amount of training samples being used. Thus, to reduce such variance, it is better to use smaller learning rates in the first few epochs of training, which justifies the warmup heuristic.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们对收敛问题进行了经验和理论分析，以确定其根源。我们表明其根本原因是：由于使用的训练样本数量有限，自适应学习率在模型训练的早期阶段具有过大的方差。因此，为了减少这种方差，最好在训练的前几个epoch使用较小的学习率，这证明了预热启发式方法的合理性。

items.en: Inspired by our analysis results, we propose a new variant of Adam, called Rectified Adam (RAdam), which explicitly rectifies the variance of the adaptive learning rate based on derivations. We conduct extensive experiments on language modeling, image classification, and neural machine translation. RAdam brings consistent improvement over the vanilla Adam, which verifies the variance issue generally exists on various tasks across different network architectures.
items.zh: 受我们分析结果的启发，我们提出了Adam的一种新变体，称为修正Adam（RAdam），它基于推导显式地修正了自适应学习率的方差。我们在语言建模、图像分类和神经机器翻译上进行了大量实验。RAdam相比原始Adam带来了一致的改进，这验证了方差问题普遍存在于不同网络架构的各种任务中。

items.en: In summary, our main contributions are two-fold:
items.zh: 总之，我们的主要贡献有两个方面：

items.en: We identify the variance issue of the adaptive learning rate and present a theoretical justification for the warmup heuristic. We show that the convergence issue is due to the undesirably large variance of the adaptive learning rate in the early stage of model training.
items.zh: 我们识别了自适应学习率的方差问题，并为预热启发式方法提供了理论依据。我们表明收敛问题是由于模型训练早期阶段自适应学习率过大的方差所致。

items.en: We propose a new variant of Adam (i.e., RAdam), which not only explicitly rectifies the variance and is theoretically sound, but also compares favorably with the heuristic warmup.
items.zh: 我们提出了Adam的一种新变体（即RAdam），它不仅显式地修正了方差且在理论上合理，而且与启发式预热相比具有优势。

items.en: Learning rate warmup. Instead of setting the learning rate αtsubscript𝛼𝑡\alpha_{t} as a constant or in a decreasing order, a learning rate warmup strategy sets αtsubscript𝛼𝑡\alpha_{t} as smaller values in the first few steps, thus not satisfying ∀t​αt+1≤αtfor-all𝑡subscript𝛼𝑡1subscript𝛼𝑡\forall t\,\alpha_{t+1}\leq\alpha_{t}. For example, linear warmup sets αt=t​α0subscript𝛼𝑡𝑡subscript𝛼0\alpha_{t}=t\,\alpha_{0} when t<Tw𝑡subscript𝑇𝑤t<T_{w}. Warmup has been demonstrated to be beneficial in many deep learning applications. For example, in the NMT experiments in Figure 1, the training loss convergences around 10 when warmup is not applied (Adam-vanilla), and it surprisingly decreases to below 3 after applying warmup (Adam-warmup).
items.zh: 学习率预热。不是将学习率αₜ设置为常数或递减顺序，学习率预热策略在前几步将αₜ设置为较小的值，因此不满足∀t αₜ₊₁ ≤ αₜ。例如，线性预热设置αₜ = t α₀当t < T_w时。预热已被证明在许多深度学习应用中是有益的。例如，在图1的NMT实验中，当不应用预热时（Adam-vanilla），训练损失收敛到大约10，而在应用预热后（Adam-warmup），它惊人地下降到3以下。

items.en: To further analyze this phenomenon, we visualize the histogram of the absolute value of gradients on a log scale in Figure 2. We observe that, without applying warmup, the gradient distribution is distorted to have a mass center in relatively small values within 10 updates. Such gradient distortion means that the vanilla Adam is trapped in bad/suspicious local optima after the first few updates. Warmup essentially reduces the impact of these problematic updates to avoid the convergence problem. In the following sections, we focus our analysis on learning rate warmup for the Adam algorithm, while it can be applied to other algorithms that use similar adaptive learning rate (ψ(.)\psi(.)) designs, e.g., RMSprop (Hinton et al., 2012) and Nadam (Dozat, 2016).
items.zh: 为了进一步分析这一现象，我们在图2中可视化了梯度绝对值的对数尺度直方图。我们观察到，在不应用预热的情况下，梯度分布在10次更新内扭曲，质量中心集中在相对较小的值。这种梯度扭曲意味着原始Adam在前几次更新后陷入了不良/可疑的局部最优。预热本质上减少了这些有问题更新的影响，以避免收敛问题。在接下来的章节中，我们将重点分析Adam算法的学习率预热，但它也可以应用于使用类似自适应学习率（ψ(.)）设计的其他算法，例如RMSprop（Hinton等人，2012）和Nadam（Dozat，2016）。

full.sec: 3 Variance of the Adaptive Learning Rate

items.en: In this section, we first introduce empirical evidence, then analyze the variance of the adaptive learning rate to support our hypothesis – Due to the lack of samples in the early stage, the adaptive learning rate has an undesirably large variance, which leads to suspicious/bad local optima.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们首先介绍经验证据，然后分析自适应学习率的方差以支持我们的假设——由于早期阶段缺乏样本，自适应学习率具有过大的方差，导致可疑/不良的局部最优。

We view {g1,⋯,gt}subscript𝑔1⋯subscript𝑔𝑡\{g_{1},\cdots,g_{t}\} as i.i.d. Gaussian random variables following 𝒩​(0,σ2)𝒩0superscript𝜎2\mathcal{N}(0,\sigma^{2})222The mean zero normal assumption is valid at the beginning of the training, since weights are sampled from normal distributions with mean zero (Balduzzi et al., 2017), further analysis is conducted in Section 5.3.. Therefore, 1/g121superscriptsubscript𝑔121/g_{1}^{2} is subject to the scaled inverse chi-squared distribution, Scale-inv-​𝒳2​(1,1/σ2)Scale-inv-superscript𝒳211superscript𝜎2\mbox{Scale-inv-}\mathcal{X}^{2}(1,1/\sigma^{2}), and Var⁡[1/g12]Var1superscriptsubscript𝑔12\operatorname{{\rm Var}}[\sqrt{1/g_{1}^{2}}] is divergent. It means that the adaptive ratio can be undesirably large in the first stage of learning. Meanwhile, setting a small learning rate at the early stage can reduce the variance (Var⁡[α​x]=α2​Var⁡[x]Var𝛼𝑥superscript𝛼2Var𝑥\operatorname{{\rm Var}}[\alpha x]=\alpha^{2}\operatorname{{\rm Var}}[x]), thus alleviating this problem. Therefore, we suggest it is the unbounded variance of the adaptive learning rate in the early stage that causes the problematic updates.
items.zh: 为了传达我们的直觉，我们从一种特殊情况开始。当t=1时，我们有ψ(g₁)=√(1/g₁²)。我们将{g₁,⋯,gₜ}视为独立同分布的高斯随机变量，服从𝒩(0,σ²)²²均值零正态假设在训练开始时是有效的，因为权重是从均值为零的正态分布中采样的（Balduzzi等人，2017），进一步分析在第5.3节进行。因此，1/g₁²服从缩放逆卡方分布Scale-inv-𝒳²(1,1/σ²)，且Var[√(1/g₁²)]是发散的。这意味着自适应比率在学习的第一阶段可能过大。同时，在早期阶段设置较小的学习率可以减少方差（Var[αx]=α²Var[x]），从而缓解此问题。因此，我们认为正是自适应学习率在早期阶段的无界方差导致了有问题的更新。

items.en: In this section, we design a set of controlled experiments to verify our hypothesis. Particularly, we design two variants of Adam that reducing the variance of the adaptive learning rate: Adam-2k and Adam-eps. We compare them to vanilla Adam with and without warmup on the IWSLT’14 German to English translation dataset (Cettolo et al., 2014).
items.zh: 在本节中，我们设计了一组控制实验来验证我们的假设。特别地，我们设计了两种减少自适应学习率方差的Adam变体：Adam-2k和Adam-eps。我们将它们与带有和不带有预热的原始Adam在IWSLT'14德英翻译数据集（Cettolo等人，2014）上进行比较。

items.en: In order to reduce the variance of the adaptive learning rate (ψ(.)\psi(.)), Adam-2k only updates ψ(.)\psi(.) in the first two thousand iterations, while the momentum (ϕ(.)\phi(.)) and parameters (θ𝜃\theta) are fixed333Different from Gotmare et al. (2019), all parameters and first moments are frozen in the first 2000 iterations.; other than this, it follows the original Adam algorithm. To make comparison with other methods, its iterations are indexed from -1999 instead of 1. In Figure 1, we observe that, after getting these additional two thousand samples for estimating the adaptive learning rate, Adam-2k avoids the convergence problem of the vanilla-Adam. Also, comparing Figure 2 and Figure 3, getting large enough samples prevents the gradient distribution from being distorted. These observations verify our hypothesis that the lack of sufficient data samples in the early stage is the root cause of the convergence issue.
items.zh: 为了减少自适应学习率（ψ(.)）的方差，Adam-2k在前两千次迭代中仅更新ψ(.)，而动量（ϕ(.)）和参数（θ）被固定³³与Gotmare等人（2019）不同，所有参数和第一动量在前2000次迭代中被冻结；除此之外，它遵循原始Adam算法。为了与其他方法进行比较，其迭代从-1999开始索引，而不是1。在图1中，我们观察到，在获得额外的两千个样本来估计自适应学习率后，Adam-2k避免了原始Adam的收敛问题。此外，比较图2和图3，获得足够大的样本可以防止梯度分布扭曲。这些观察验证了我们的假设，即早期阶段缺乏足够的数据样本是收敛问题的根本原因。

items.en: Another straightforward way to reduce the variance is to increase the value of ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon in ψ^​(g1,⋯,gt)=1−β2tϵ+(1−β2)​∑i=1tβ2t−i​gi2^𝜓subscript𝑔1⋯subscript𝑔𝑡1superscriptsubscript𝛽2𝑡italic-ϵ1subscript𝛽2superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝑡superscriptsubscript𝛽2𝑡𝑖superscriptsubscript𝑔𝑖2\widehat{\psi}(g_{1},\cdots,g_{t})=\frac{\sqrt{1-\beta_{2}^{t}}}{\epsilon+\sqrt{(1-\beta_{2})\sum_{i=1}^{t}\beta_{2}^{t-i}g_{i}^{2}}}. Actually, if we assume ψ^(.)\widehat{\psi}(.) is subject to the uniform distribution, its variance equals to 112​ϵ2112superscriptitalic-ϵ2\frac{1}{12\epsilon^{2}}. Therefore, we design Adam-eps, which uses a non-negligibly large ϵ=10−4italic-ϵsuperscript104\epsilon=10^{-4}, while ϵ=10−8italic-ϵsuperscript108\epsilon=10^{-8} for vanilla Adam. Its performance is summarized in Figure 1. We observe that it does not suffer from the serious convergence problem of vanilla-Adam. This further demonstrates that the convergence problem can be alleviated by reducing the variance of the adaptive learning rate, and also explains why tuning ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon is important in practice (Liu et al., 2019). Besides, similar to Adam-2k, it prevents the gradient distribution from being distorted (as shown in Figure 3). However, as in Figure 1, it produces a much worse performance comparing to Adam-2k and Adam-warmup. We conjecture that this is because large ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon induces a large bias into the adaptive learning rate and slows down the optimization process. Thus, we need a more principled and rigorous way to control the variance of the adaptive learning rate. In the next subsection, we will present a theoretical analysis of the variance of the adaptive learning rate.
items.zh: 另一种降低方差的简单方法是增大 ψ^(g1,⋯,gt)=1−β2tϵ+(1−β2)∑i=1tβ2t−igi2 中的 ϵ 值。实际上，如果假设 ψ^(·) 服从均匀分布，其方差等于 1/(12ϵ^2)。因此，我们设计了 Adam-eps，它使用不可忽略的大 ϵ=10^{-4}，而原始 Adam 使用 ϵ=10^{-8}。其性能总结在图 1 中。我们观察到它没有遭受原始 Adam 的严重收敛问题。这进一步表明收敛问题可以通过降低自适应学习率的方差来缓解，也解释了为什么在实践中调整 ϵ 很重要（Liu 等人，2019）。此外，与 Adam-2k 类似，它防止了梯度分布被扭曲（如图 3 所示）。然而，如图 1 所示，与 Adam-2k 和 Adam-warmup 相比，它的性能差得多。我们推测这是因为大的 ϵ 给自适应学习率引入了大的偏差，并减慢了优化过程。因此，我们需要一种更原则性和严格的方法来控制自适应学习率的方差。在下一小节中，我们将对自适应学习率的方差进行理论分析。

full.sec: 4.3 In Comparison with Warmup and Other Stabilization Techniques
full.secZh: 4.3 与预热及其他稳定技术的比较

items.en: Different from the analysis in this paper, warmup is originally proposed to handle training with very large batches for SGD (Goyal et al., 2017; Gotmare et al., 2019; Bernstein et al., 2018; Xiao et al., 2017). We notice that rtsubscript𝑟𝑡r_{t} has a similar form to the heuristic linear warmup, which can be viewed as setting the rectification term as m​i​n​(t,Tw)Tw𝑚𝑖𝑛𝑡subscript𝑇𝑤subscript𝑇𝑤\frac{min(t,T_{w})}{T_{w}}. It verifies our intuition that warmup works as a variance reduction technique. RAdam deactivates the adaptive learning rate when its variance is divergent, thus avoiding undesired instability in the first few updates. Besides, our method does not require an additional hyperparameter (i.e., Twsubscript𝑇𝑤T_{w}) and can automatically adapt to different moving average rules.
items.zh: 与本文的分析不同，预热最初是为了处理 SGD 中非常大的批次训练而提出的（Goyal 等人，2017；Gotmare 等人，2019；Bernstein 等人，2018；Xiao 等人，2017）。我们注意到 r_t 与启发式线性预热具有相似的形式，后者可以视为将修正项设置为 min(t, T_w)/T_w。这验证了我们的直觉，即预热作为一种方差减小技术。RAdam 在自适应学习率方差发散时将其停用，从而避免了前几次更新中不希望的不稳定性。此外，我们的方法不需要额外的超参数（即 T_w），并且可以自动适应不同的移动平均规则。

items.en: Here, we identify and address an underlying issue of adaptive optimization methods independent of (neural) model architectures. Thus, the proposed rectification term is orthogonal to other training stabilization techniques such as gradient clipping (Bengio et al., 2013), smoothing the adaptive learning rate (i.e., increasing ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, applying geometric mean filter (Chen et al., 2018), or adding range constraints (Luo et al., 2019)), initialization (Balduzzi et al., 2017; Zhang et al., 2019) and normalization (Ba et al., 2016; Ioffe & Szegedy, 2015). Indeed, these techniques can be combined with the proposed variance rectification method.
items.zh: 这里，我们识别并解决了自适应优化方法的一个潜在问题，该问题独立于（神经）模型架构。因此，所提出的修正项与其他训练稳定技术正交，例如梯度裁剪（Bengio 等人，2013）、平滑自适应学习率（即增大 ϵ、应用几何平均滤波器（Chen 等人，2018）或添加范围约束（Luo 等人，2019））、初始化（Balduzzi 等人，2017；Zhang 等人，2019）和归一化（Ba 等人，2016；Ioffe & Szegedy，2015）。实际上，这些技术可以与所提出的方差修正方法结合使用。

items.en: We evaluate RAdam on several benchmarks: One Billion Word for language modeling; Cifar10 and ImageNet for image classification; IWSLT’14 De-En/EN-DE and WMT’16 EN-De for neural machine translation. Following Loshchilov & Hutter (2018), we decouple weight decays in the vanilla Adam, Adam with warmup and RAdam in our experiments. Details are in Appendix B.
items.zh: 我们在几个基准上评估 RAdam：用于语言建模的 One Billion Word；用于图像分类的 Cifar10 和 ImageNet；用于神经机器翻译的 IWSLT'14 De-En/EN-DE 和 WMT'16 EN-De。遵循 Loshchilov & Hutter (2018)，我们在实验中解耦了原始 Adam、带预热的 Adam 和 RAdam 中的权重衰减。细节见附录 B。

items.en: As analyzed before, the adaptive learning rate has undesirably large variance in the early stage of training and leads to suspicious/bad local optima on NMT. One question we are interested in is: whether such an issue widely exits in other similar tasks and applications. Thus, we conduct a set of experiments with two classical tasks of NLP and CV, i.e., language modeling and image classification. RAdam not only results in consistent improvements over the vanilla Adam, but also demonstrates its robustness to the change of learning rates. It verifies that the variance issue exists in various machine learning applications, and has a big impact on the model behavior.
items.zh: 如前所述，自适应学习率在训练早期存在过大的方差，导致神经机器翻译中出现可疑/不良的局部最优。我们感兴趣的一个问题是：这种问题是否广泛存在于其他类似任务和应用中。因此，我们在自然语言处理和计算机视觉的两个经典任务（即语言建模和图像分类）上进行了一系列实验。RAdam 不仅比原始 Adam 有持续改进，还展示了其对学习率变化的鲁棒性。这验证了方差问题存在于各种机器学习应用中，并对模型行为有重大影响。

items.en: Performance Comparison. The performances on language modeling (i.e., One Billion Word (Chelba et al., 2013)) and image classification (i.e., CIFAR10 (Krizhevsky et al., 2009) and ImageNet (Deng et al., 2009)) are presented in Figure 4, 5. The results show that RAdam outperforms Adam in all three datasets. As shown in Figure 4, although the rectification term makes RAdam slower than the vanilla Adam in the first few epochs, it allows RAdam to converge faster after that. In other words, by reducing the variance of the adaptive learning rate in the early stage, it gets both faster convergence and better performance, which verifies the impact of the variance issue. We also observe that RAdam obtains consistent improvements over Adam on image classification. It is worth noting that, on both ImageNet and CIFAR10, although RAdam fails to outperform SGD in terms of test accuracy, it results in a better training performance (e.g., the training accuracy of SGD, Adam, and RAdam on ImageNet are 69.5769.5769.57, 69.1269.1269.12 and 70.3070.3070.30 respectively).
items.zh: 性能比较。语言建模（即 One Billion Word (Chelba et al., 2013)）和图像分类（即 CIFAR10 (Krizhevsky et al., 2009) 和 ImageNet (Deng et al., 2009)）的性能如图 4 和图 5 所示。结果表明，RAdam 在所有三个数据集上都优于 Adam。如图 4 所示，尽管修正项使 RAdam 在最初几个 epoch 比原始 Adam 慢，但之后它使 RAdam 收敛更快。换句话说，通过减少早期自适应学习率的方差，它实现了更快的收敛和更好的性能，这验证了方差问题的影响。我们还观察到，RAdam 在图像分类上比 Adam 有持续改进。值得注意的是，在 ImageNet 和 CIFAR10 上，尽管 RAdam 在测试准确率上未能超过 SGD，但它取得了更好的训练性能（例如，SGD、Adam 和 RAdam 在 ImageNet 上的训练准确率分别为 69.57、69.12 和 70.30）。

items.en: Robustness to Learning Rate Change. Besides performance improvements, RAdam also improves the robustness of model training. We use different initial learning rates, conduct experiments with ResNet-20 on the CIFAR10 datasets, and summarize their performance in Figure 6. For learning rates within a broad range (i.e., {0.1,0.03,0.01,0.003}0.10.030.010.003\{0.1,0.03,0.01,0.003\}), RAdam achieves consistent model performances (their test accuracy curves highly overlap with each other), while Adam and SGD are shown to be more sensitive to the learning rate. The observation can be interpreted that by rectifying the variance of the adaptive learning rate, RAdam improves the robustness of model training and can adapt to different learning rates of a broader range.
items.zh: 对学习率变化的鲁棒性。除了性能提升，RAdam 还提高了模型训练的鲁棒性。我们使用不同的初始学习率，在 CIFAR10 数据集上用 ResNet-20 进行实验，并将性能总结在图 6 中。对于广泛范围内的学习率（即 {0.1, 0.03, 0.01, 0.003}），RAdam 取得了一致的模型性能（其测试准确率曲线高度重叠），而 Adam 和 SGD 对学习率更敏感。这一观察可以解释为：通过修正自适应学习率的方差，RAdam 提高了模型训练的鲁棒性，并能适应更广泛范围内的不同学习率。

items.en: To examine the effectiveness of RAdam, we first conduct comparisons on neural machine translation, on which the state-of-the-art employs Adam with the linear warmup. Specifically, we conduct experiments on three datasets, i.e., IWSLT’14 De-En, IWSLT’14 En-De, and WMT’16 En-De. Due to the limited size of the IWSLT’14 dataset, we conduct experiments using 5 different random seeds and report their mean and standard derivation. As discussed before, the vanilla Adam algorithm leads to suspicious/bad local optima (i.e., converges to a training perplexity around 500), and needs a learning rate warmup stage to stabilize the training.
items.zh: 为了检验 RAdam 的有效性，我们首先在神经机器翻译上进行对比，该领域的最先进方法使用带线性 warmup 的 Adam。具体来说，我们在三个数据集上进行实验：IWSLT'14 De-En、IWSLT'14 En-De 和 WMT'16 En-De。由于 IWSLT'14 数据集规模有限，我们使用 5 个不同的随机种子进行实验，并报告其均值和标准差。如前所述，原始 Adam 算法会导致可疑/不良的局部最优（即收敛到训练困惑度约 500），需要学习率 warmup 阶段来稳定训练。

items.en: We summarize the performance obtained with the heuristic warmup and our proposed rectification term in Table 2 and visualize the training curve of IWSLT De-En in Figure 1. With a consistent adaptive learning rate variance, our proposed method achieves similar performance to that of previous state-of-the-art warmup heuristics. It verifies our intuition that the problematic updates of Adam are indeed caused by the undesirably large variance in the early stage.
items.zh: 我们将启发式 warmup 和我们提出的修正项所获得的性能总结在表 2 中，并在图 1 中可视化了 IWSLT De-En 的训练曲线。通过一致的自适应学习率方差，我们提出的方法取得了与先前最先进 warmup 启发式方法相似的性能。这验证了我们的直觉：Adam 的有问题更新确实是由早期过大的方差引起的。

items.en: Moreover, we applied Adam with warmup on the CIFAR10 dataset. Its best accuracy on the test set is 91.2991.2991.29, which is similar to RAdam (91.3891.3891.38). However, we found that RAdam requires less hyperparameter tuning. Specifically, we visualize their learning curves in Figure 7. For some warmup steps, Adam with warmup is relatively more sensitive to the choice of the learning rate. RAdam, at the same time, is not only more robust, but also can automatically control the warmup behavior (i.e., without requiring the length of warmup). For example, when setting the learning rate as 0.10.10.1, Adam with 100 steps of warmup fails to get satisfying performance and only results in an accuracy of 90.1390.1390.13; RAdam successfully gets an accuracy of 91.0691.0691.06, with the original setting of the moving average calculation (i.e., β1=0.9,β2=0.999formulae-sequencesubscript𝛽10.9subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{1}=0.9,\beta_{2}=0.999). We conjecture the reason is due to the fact that RAdam, which is based on a rigorous variance analysis, explicitly avoids the extreme situation where the variance is divergent, and rectifies the variance to be consistent in other situations.
items.zh: 此外，我们在 CIFAR10 数据集上应用了带 warmup 的 Adam。其在测试集上的最佳准确率为 91.29，与 RAdam（91.38）相似。然而，我们发现 RAdam 需要更少的超参数调整。具体来说，我们在图 7 中可视化了它们的学习曲线。对于某些 warmup 步数，带 warmup 的 Adam 对学习率的选择相对更敏感。同时，RAdam 不仅更鲁棒，还能自动控制 warmup 行为（即不需要 warmup 长度）。例如，当学习率设为 0.1 时，带 100 步 warmup 的 Adam 未能取得令人满意的性能，仅达到 90.13 的准确率；而 RAdam 在移动平均计算的原始设置（即 β1=0.9, β2=0.999）下成功取得了 91.06 的准确率。我们推测原因是 RAdam 基于严格的方差分析，明确避免了方差发散极端情况，并在其他情况下将方差修正为一致。

items.en: Scaled Inverse Chi-Square Distribution Assumption. In this paper, we assume gisubscript𝑔𝑖g_{i} accords to a Normal distribution with a zero mean. We also assume ψ2(.)\psi^{2}(.) accords to the scaled inverse chi-square distribution to derive the variance of Var[ψ(.)]\operatorname{{\rm Var}}[\psi(.)], based on the similarity between the exponential moving average and simple moving average. Here, we empirically verify this assumption.
items.zh: 缩放逆卡方分布假设。在本文中，我们假设 g_i 服从均值为零的正态分布。我们还假设 ψ^2(.) 服从缩放逆卡方分布，以推导 Var[ψ(.)] 的方差，这是基于指数移动平均和简单移动平均之间的相似性。这里，我们通过实验验证这一假设。

items.en: Specifically, since gisubscript𝑔𝑖g_{i} in the optimization problem may not be zero-mean, we assume its expectation is μ𝜇\mu and sample gisubscript𝑔𝑖g_{i} from 𝒩​(μ,1)𝒩𝜇1\mathcal{N}(\mu,1). Then, based on these samples, we calculate the variance of the original adaptive learning rate and the proposed rectified adaptive learning rate, i.e., Var⁡[1vt^]Var1^subscript𝑣𝑡\operatorname{{\rm Var}}[\frac{1}{\widehat{v_{t}}}] and Var⁡[rtvt^]Varsubscript𝑟𝑡^subscript𝑣𝑡\operatorname{{\rm Var}}[\frac{r_{t}}{\widehat{v_{t}}}] respectively. We set β2subscript𝛽2\beta_{2} to 0.9990.9990.999, the number of sampled trajectories to 500050005000, the number of iterations to 600060006000, and summarize the simulation results in Figure 9. Across all six settings with different μ𝜇\mu, the adaptive learning rate has a larger variance in the first stage and the rectified adaptive learning rate has relative consistent variance. This verifies the reliability of our assumption.
items.zh: 具体来说，由于优化问题中的 g_i 可能不是零均值，我们假设其期望为 μ，并从 N(μ,1) 中采样 g_i。然后，基于这些样本，我们计算原始自适应学习率和提出的修正自适应学习率的方差，即 Var[1/√(v_t)] 和 Var[r_t/√(v_t)]。我们将 β2 设为 0.999，采样轨迹数设为 5000，迭代次数设为 6000，并将模拟结果总结在图 9 中。在所有六个不同 μ 的设置中，自适应学习率在第一阶段具有较大方差，而修正后的自适应学习率具有相对一致的方差。这验证了我们假设的可靠性。

items.en: In this paper, we explore the underlying principle of the effectiveness of the warmup heuristic used for adaptive optimization algorithms. Specifically, we identify that, due to the limited amount of samples in the early stage of model training, the adaptive learning rate has an undesirably large variance and can cause the model to converge to suspicious/bad local optima. We provide both empirical and theoretical evidence to support our hypothesis, and further propose a new variant of Adam, whose adaptive learning rate is rectified so as to have a consistent variance. Empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. In future work, we plan to replace the rectification strategy by sharing the second moment estimation across similar parameters.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们探讨了用于自适应优化算法的 warmup 启发式方法有效性的基本原理。具体来说，我们发现，由于模型训练早期样本数量有限，自适应学习率具有过大的方差，可能导致模型收敛到可疑/不良的局部最优。我们提供了经验和理论证据来支持我们的假设，并进一步提出了一种新的 Adam 变体，其自适应学习率被修正以具有一致的方差。实验结果证明了我们提出方法的有效性。在未来工作中，我们计划通过跨相似参数共享二阶矩估计来替代修正策略。
